nodes.label: Market State Snapshot and Pattern Tests
nodes.norm_label: market state snapshot and pattern tests

nodes.label: Market State Analyzer and Chart Singletons
nodes.norm_label: market state analyzer and chart singletons

nodes.label: No Unrequested Commit or Push Policy
nodes.norm_label: no unrequested commit or push policy

nodes.label: Independent Multi-Pattern Detection
nodes.rationale: Read four closed candles once per timeframe and evaluate detectors independently so one candle can emit multiple distinct matches.

nodes.label: Process Environment Precedence
nodes.rationale: Repository-local dotenv values use setdefault so explicit process environment variables remain authoritative.

nodes.label: 127.0.0.1:8000 Default
nodes.rationale: Python and MQL5 default to a local Windows deployment while preserving runtime overrides and the unused systemd artifact.

nodes.label: Unified Timeframe Snapshot Pipeline
nodes.rationale: MT5 computes market facts from local history; Python validates, atomically persists, deduplicates, and presents them.

nodes.label: One-Way Canonical Source Copy
nodes.rationale: The tracked canonical source is copied to the live MetaTrader target to prevent direct live-file edits from becoming the source of truth.

nodes.label: Candle-Defined Chart Axis
nodes.rationale: The y-axis is derived only from candle prices so distant key levels become labels instead of compressing visible candlesticks.

nodes.label: Market and Trade EA Separation
nodes.rationale: Common transport and candle primitives are shared, while market-only and trade-only behavior live behind thin independent EA lifecycle files.

nodes.label: Shooting Star, Inverted Hammer, Star, and Inside Bar Rules
nodes.norm_label: shooting star, inverted hammer, star, and inside bar rules

nodes.label: Legacy Pattern Payload Compatibility
nodes.rationale: New event names, bias, and labeled OHLC are added while retaining the old open-close display when high or low is absent.

nodes.label: Standard-Library Dotenv Loader
nodes.rationale: A small parser avoids a dependency, loads before module state initialization, tolerates a missing file, and never overwrites existing environment values.

nodes.label: Support, Resistance, Fibonacci, PDH/PDL, and FVG Levels
nodes.norm_label: support, resistance, fibonacci, pdh/pdl, and fvg levels

nodes.label: Pause Suppresses Alerts but Preserves State
nodes.rationale: Snapshots continue updating while paused so on-demand reports remain current even though automatic alerts are suppressed.
nodes.norm_label: pause suppresses alerts but preserves state

nodes.label: Canonical MQ5 Source
nodes.rationale: A regular repository file is authoritative while the root symlink preserves direct MetaTrader access.

nodes.label: sync_mq5.py One-Way Sync
nodes.rationale: One-way copying prevents live MetaTrader changes from silently replacing repository source.

nodes.label: Webhook1 Market Data Ownership
nodes.rationale: Keeping chart history in Webhook1 preserves the boundary between market analysis and trade management.

nodes.label: validate_snapshot
nodes.rationale: Optional source and dual time-field support retain compatibility with older snapshot producers.

nodes.label: Candle-Derived Y-Axis
nodes.rationale: Key levels never expand the plot range, preventing distant levels from compressing visible candles.

nodes.label: Out-of-Range Level Label Rail
nodes.rationale: Distant levels remain informative without changing candle scale.

nodes.label: Candle-First Render Order
nodes.rationale: Drawing candle bodies and outlines last guarantees visible candle colors.

nodes.label: WebhookCommon.mqh
nodes.rationale: Contains only behavior genuinely used by both EAs.

nodes.label: Two-EA Canonical and Live Sync Layout
nodes.rationale: All shared MQL5 code remains tracked in Git and is copied to the live installation in one run.
nodes.norm_label: two-ea canonical and live sync layout

nodes.label: Optional EA Source Compatibility
nodes.rationale: Accepting webhook1, webhook2, or a missing source preserves old clients while enabling source-aware diagnostics.

nodes.label: Python Standard Library Runtime
nodes.rationale: Everything except image rendering uses the standard library, minimizing runtime dependencies.

hyperedges.label: Market Snapshot State and Reporting Flow
